Name: mutable-argument-default
Message: Do not use mutable data structures for argument defaults

Name: unused-variable
Message: Local variable assigned but never used

Name: none-comparison
Message: Comparison to None should be 'cond is None'

Name: missing-newline-at-end-of-file
Message: No newline at end of file

Name: unnecessary-literal-set
Message: Unnecessary list/tuple literal (rewrite as set literal)

Name: collapsible-if
Message: Use single if instead of nested if statements

Name: needless-bool
Message: Return condition directly instead of if-else

Name: if-else-block-instead-of-if-exp
Message: Use ternary operator instead of if-else-block

Name: if-with-same-arms
Message: Combine if branches using logical or operator

Name: multiple-with-statements
Message: Use single with statement with multiple contexts

Name: in-dict-keys
Message: Use 'key in dict' instead of 'key in dict.keys()'

Name: implicit-return
Message: Missing explicit return at end of function

Name: os-path-join
Message: Use Path with / operator instead of os.path.join()

Name: builtin-open
Message: Use Path.open() instead of builtin open()

Name: non-pep585-annotation
Message: Use modern type annotations (list instead of List)

Name: non-pep604-annotation-union
Message: Use X | Y syntax for unions

Name: too-many-arguments
Message: Too many arguments in function definition

Name: collapsible-else-if
Message: Use elif instead of else then if

Name: import-outside-top-level
Message: Import should be at top level of file

Name: modified-iterating-set
Message: Iterated set is modified within for loop

Name: collection-literal-concatenation
Message: Use list/set/dict comprehension instead of concatenation

Name: explicit-f-string-type-conversion
Message: Use explicit conversion flag in f-string

Name: unnecessary-iterable-allocation-for-first-element
Message: Use next() instead of slice for first element

Name: unnecessary-key-check
Message: Unnecessary key check before dictionary access

Name: none-not-at-end-of-union
Message: None should be at end of type union

Name: root-logger-call
Message: Call on root logger (use module logger instead)

Name: logging-f-string
Message: Logging statement uses f-string (use lazy evaluation)

Name: lambda-assignment
Message: Do not assign lambda expression (use def)

Name: unused-loop-control-variable
Message: Loop control variable not used in loop body

Name: function-uses-loop-variable
Message: Function defined in loop uses loop variable

Name: star-arg-unpacking-after-keyword-arg
Message: Star argument unpacking after keyword argument

Name: loop-iterator-mutation
Message: Mutation to loop iterable during iteration

Name: if-tuple
Message: If test is a tuple (always True)

Name: raise-not-implemented
Message: raise NotImplemented should be raise NotImplementedError

Name: single-line-implicit-string-concatenation
Message: Implicitly concatenated string literals on one line

Name: invalid-class-name
Message: Class name should use CapWords convention

Name: invalid-first-argument-name-for-class-method
Message: First argument of class method should be named cls

Name: invalid-first-argument-name-for-method
Message: First argument of method should be named self

Name: non-lowercase-variable-in-function
Message: Variable in function should be lowercase

Name: error-suffix-on-exception-name
Message: Exception name should have Error suffix

Name: manual-list-comprehension
Message: Use list comprehension instead of manual for loop

Name: manual-list-copy
Message: Use list() or list.copy() to create a copy

Name: manual-dict-comprehension
Message: Use dictionary comprehension instead of manual for loop

Name: deprecated-log-warn
Message: warn is deprecated in favor of warning

Name: blanket-type-ignore
Message: Use specific rule codes when ignoring type issues

Name: blanket-noqa
Message: Use specific rule codes when using noqa

Name: pytest-unittest-assertion
Message: Use regular assert instead of unittest-style assertion

Name: pytest-raises-too-broad
Message: pytest.raises() is too broad (use match parameter)

Name: pytest-raises-with-multiple-statements
Message: pytest.raises() block should contain single statement

Name: pytest-composite-assertion
Message: Assertion should be broken down into multiple parts

Name: pytest-useless-yield-fixture
Message: No teardown in fixture (use return instead of yield)

Name: bad-quotes-inline-string
Message: Double quotes preferred (or single quotes if configured)

Name: avoidable-escaped-quote
Message: Change outer quotes to avoid escaping inner quotes

Name: assert
Message: Use of assert detected (can be optimized away)

Name: suspicious-non-cryptographic-random-usage
Message: Standard random not suitable for cryptographic purposes

Name: hardcoded-sql-expression
Message: SQL injection risk with string-based query

Name: raise-vanilla-class
Message: Create your own exception (don't raise vanilla Exception)

Name: raise-vanilla-args
Message: Avoid long messages outside exception class

Name: reraise-no-cause
Message: Use raise from to specify exception cause

Name: try-consider-else
Message: Consider moving code to else block

Name: non-pep695-type-alias
Message: Use type keyword for type aliases
